moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Underway
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across various UK cities, is now in full swing, with matches continuing through early July.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is on in the UK! Catch the world's best battling it out for glory. Who are you backing?

angles.name: England Matches
angles.copy: England are in action at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup this week! They face West Indies on June 24th at Lord's and New Zealand on June 27th at The Kia Oval. Get behind them!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues its group stage matches, with England playing Croatia on June 17, Ghana on June 23, and Panama on June 27.

angles.name: England's Next Match
angles.copy: It's World Cup week! England are up against Croatia on Wednesday. Can the Three Lions get a crucial win? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Where to Watch
angles.copy: Planning your World Cup viewing? England's matches this week are against Croatia (June 17), Ghana (June 23), and Panama (June 27). Get your plans sorted!

moments.title: Premier League Summer Transfer Window Open
moments.blurb: The Premier League summer transfer window is officially open, with clubs making their moves to strengthen squads before the September 1 deadline.

angles.name: Transfer Gossip
angles.copy: The rumour mill is in full swing! Which Premier League club needs to make the biggest signing this summer? #TransferWindow

angles.name: Club Specific
angles.copy: Your club's summer transfer window is open! Who are you hoping to see arrive (or leave!) before September 1st? #FootballTransfers

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival takes place from June 18-21, 2026, featuring headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Wet Leg, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival kicks off this Thursday! Who are you most excited to see on the lineup? #IOW2026

angles.name: Headliner Spotlight
angles.copy: From Lewis Capaldi to The Cure, the Isle of Wight Festival has something for everyone starting this week! What's your must-see act?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival returns to Glasgow Green from June 19-21, 2026, with a line-up including Richard Ashcroft, Wolf Alice, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Get Ready
angles.copy: TRNSMT takes over Glasgow Green this weekend! Who's heading to see Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, or Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready for TRNSMT? Another huge lineup bringing the noise to Scotland this weekend!

moments.title: Parklife Festival in Manchester
moments.blurb: Manchester's Parklife Festival, the UK's biggest metropolitan festival, takes place on June 20-21, 2026.

angles.name: Manchester Festival
angles.copy: Parklife is back this weekend! Manchester, are you ready for two days of incredible music? #Parklife2026

angles.name: Urban Festival
angles.copy: The UK's biggest metropolitan festival, Parklife, is happening this Saturday and Sunday! Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Novuna UK Athletics Outdoor Championships
moments.blurb: The Novuna UK Athletics Outdoor Championships return to Birmingham's Alexander Stadium on June 20-21, 2026, crowning national champions.

angles.name: Athletics Action
angles.copy: Britain's best athletes head to Birmingham this weekend for the Novuna UK Athletics Outdoor Championships! Who will be crowned champion? #UKAthletics

angles.name: Road to Euros
angles.copy: The UK Athletics Championships are a key event for selections for the European Athletics Championships later this summer. Big stakes in Birmingham this weekend!

moments.title: English Wine Week Begins
moments.blurb: English Wine Week runs from June 20-28, 2026, celebrating winemakers across England with events and tastings.

angles.name: Raise a Glass
angles.copy: Cheers to English Wine Week, starting this Saturday! Discover local vineyards and celebrate the best of English winemaking. #EnglishWine

angles.name: Tasting Events
angles.copy: Looking for something different this weekend? English Wine Week kicks off with tastings and events at vineyards across the country!

moments.title: Taylor Swift tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack is the current UK Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is your new UK Number 1 single. What a track! #TaylorSwift

angles.name: Toy Story Hit
angles.copy: Taylor Swift hitting Number 1 with a song from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack? Iconic. 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is flying high! #Swifties

moments.title: Ariana Grande's Chart Success
moments.blurb: Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' debuted at Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart on June 5, 2026, and is currently at Number 3.

angles.name: Still a Huge Hit
angles.copy: Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' is still dominating the charts, sitting pretty at Number 3! Have you streamed it today? #ArianaGrande

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean in the Top 3
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' is currently holding strong at Number 2 on the UK Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: UK Talent
angles.copy: Two of the UK's finest, Sam Fender and Olivia Dean, are still in the Top 3 with 'Rein Me In'! What a track. #SamFender

moments.title: Little Disasters Airs on Channel 5
moments.blurb: The thriller series 'Little Disasters', based on Sarah Vaughan's novel, makes its terrestrial TV debut on Channel 5, with episodes continuing tonight and tomorrow.

angles.name: Must-Watch Drama
angles.copy: Catch 'Little Disasters' on Channel 5 tonight! This gripping thriller will have you hooked. Who's watching?

angles.name: TV Tonight
angles.copy: If you missed it last night, 'Little Disasters' continues tonight on Channel 5. Dive into this intense drama!

moments.title: Funboys Series Two Starts on BBC Three
moments.blurb: The second series of 'Funboys' premieres tonight on BBC Three, with award-winning actor Steve Coogan joining the cast.

angles.name: New Comedy
angles.copy: Steve Coogan joins 'Funboys' for its second series, starting tonight on BBC Three! Get ready for some laughs. #Funboys

angles.name: Coogan's Return
angles.copy: Steve Coogan is back on our screens in 'Funboys Series Two' tonight on BBC Three! Don't miss it.

moments.title: The Light in the Hall on Channel 4
moments.blurb: A new drama, 'The Light in the Hall', begins tomorrow on Channel 4, exploring a thirty-year-old mystery.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Drama
angles.copy: Looking for your next gripping drama? 'The Light in the Hall' starts tomorrow on Channel 4. Get ready for a mystery!

angles.name: Welsh Connection
angles.copy: Don't miss 'The Light in the Hall' on Channel 4 tomorrow, a new drama delving into secrets that have shaped a Welsh community for decades.

moments.title: Noddy Holder's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Noddy Holder, the iconic lead vocalist of Slade, turns 79 today.

angles.name: Glam Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Noddy Holder of Slade! What's your favourite Slade track? #NoddyHolder

angles.name: It's Chriiiistmas!
angles.copy: The man who gave us 'Merry Xmas Everybody' is 79 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Noddy Holder! #GlamRock

moments.title: Russell Hitchcock's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Russell Hitchcock, the distinctive lead singer of soft rock duo Air Supply, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Soft Rock Voice
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Russell Hitchcock, the incredible voice of Air Supply! What's your favourite power ballad from them? #AirSupply

angles.name: Love Songs
angles.copy: Celebrating Russell Hitchcock's 77th birthday today! His vocals with Air Supply gave us so many classic love songs. #SoftRock

moments.title: Ice Cube's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Rapper and actor Ice Cube, a pioneer of gangsta rap, turns 57 today.

angles.name: Rap Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary Ice Cube! From N.W.A to a successful solo career, he's a true icon. #IceCube

angles.name: Today Was A Good Day
angles.copy: It's Ice Cube's 57th birthday! Time to blast some N.W.A and celebrate a rap pioneer. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Aurora Aksnes' 29th Birthday
moments.blurb: Norwegian singer-songwriter Aurora Aksnes, known simply as Aurora, celebrates her 29th birthday today.

angles.name: Unique Talent
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the enchanting Aurora! Her unique sound continues to captivate. What's your favourite song by her? #Aurora

moments.title: Blake Shelton's 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: American country music superstar Blake Shelton will celebrate his 49th birthday on June 18.

angles.name: Country Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 49th Birthday to country music icon Blake Shelton this Thursday! What's your favourite Blake hit? #BlakeShelton

moments.title: Lily Allen in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Lily Allen is scheduled to perform at the OVO Hydro Glasgow on June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Glasgow Gig
angles.copy: Glasgow, get ready! Lily Allen is playing the OVO Hydro this Thursday. Who's excited? #LilyAllen

moments.title: Harry Styles at Wembley Stadium
moments.blurb: Harry Styles has two shows at Wembley Stadium on June 18 and 19, 2026.

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Harry Styles is taking over Wembley Stadium for two nights this Thursday and Friday! Who's got tickets to see him? #HarryStyles

moments.title: Elvis Costello & The Imposters Live
moments.blurb: Elvis Costello & The Imposters with Charlie Sexton are performing at the Royal Albert Hall tonight as part of their 'Radio Soul!' tour.

angles.name: London Gig
angles.copy: Tonight in London, Elvis Costello & The Imposters are bringing their 'Radio Soul!' tour to the Royal Albert Hall! An unmissable show. #ElvisCostello

moments.title: Neil Young & The Chrome Hearts in Stockton
moments.blurb: Neil Young and The Chrome Hearts, alongside Elvis Costello & The Imposters and Charlie Sexton, are playing the Stockton Globe on June 19.

angles.name: North East Rock
angles.copy: Neil Young and The Chrome Hearts are at the Stockton Globe this Friday! A legendary night of music on the cards. #NeilYoung

moments.title: Amy Macdonald Live in Stockton
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter Amy Macdonald performs at the Stockton Globe on June 19, 2026.

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Amy Macdonald is bringing her incredible live show to the Stockton Globe this Friday! Who's got their tickets? #AmyMacdonald

moments.title: UB40 Play Birmingham
moments.blurb: Reggae legends UB40 are set to perform at bp Pulse Live in Birmingham on June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Birmingham Reggae
angles.copy: UB40 are playing in their hometown of Birmingham this Saturday at bp Pulse Live! Get ready for a night of reggae classics. #UB40

moments.title: Pride Month Celebrations Continue
moments.blurb: June is Pride Month, a global celebration of LGBTQ+ culture and rights, with events happening across the UK.

angles.name: Celebrating Pride
angles.copy: Happy Pride Month! We're celebrating LGBTQ+ communities and standing for equality across the UK all month long. #Pride2026

angles.name: London Pride
angles.copy: London is celebrating Pride Month throughout June with events across the city. How are you showing your support? #PrideInLondon
